title: Sales Manager ( Energy and Offshore )
description:
We are looking for a Sales Manager (Energy and Offshore) to expand our Energy business in the Oil/ Gas and offshore markets in the local and regional areas. Reporting to Head of Energy, he/ she will

  • Source for new prospects and recommend suitable marine products/integrated systems and services for sea worthiness.
  • Manage and analyse sales leads to create and forecast the business plan for the potential customers.
  • Implement and execute all business plans, while aligning to our corporate goals, to achieve sales performance target.
  • Work with the internal proposal team to create high quality proposals for the customers, while aligning to customers needs.
  • Liaise closely with the technical team to ensure efficiency in the sales and delivery of systems and services to the customers.
  • Respond to customers enquiries and maintain the relationship with existing customers.
  • Any other ad hoc duties as assigned.

Requirements:

  • Diploma/Bachelor's Degree in Engineering.
  • 1 - 4 years relevant working experience with good sales track record.
  • Good marine industry knowledge in the Energy Sector.
  • Experience as Ex-Sailors, Ex-Radio Officers, or Ex-Navy personnel are added advantages.
  • Respectable network and customer contacts with local and regional shipyards and ship owners.
  • Possess excellent business acumen, communication & presentation skills.
  • Career progression pathway is available.

Are you interested in the opportunity? Please feel free to reach out to Carol at carol.sun@peopleprofilers.com﻿

Job Reference: ﻿4RVXY877

Reg. Number: R25129558 | EA License Number: 02C4944

postedCompany.description:
Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
